requirement_topic.en: Battery regulation and substances: DOSM conformity, IEC/ASEAN adoption, and no horizontal RoHS
requirement_topic.zh: 电池法规与物质限制：DOSM合格评定、IEC/ASEAN采标及无横向RoHS
requirement_topic.zht: 電池法規與物質限制：DOSM合格評定、IEC/ASEAN採標及無橫向RoHS

summary.en: Laos does not have an EU-style horizontal battery regulation or horizontal RoHS regime for all electrical and electronic equipment. For lithium batteries and power banks, the practical target-market screen is whether the product is treated as a regulated good requiring DOSM conformity certification, plus whether Laos has adopted or references the relevant IEC/ASEAN safety standard. Energy-storage or EV-related use may also require project-level alignment with MEM policy and EDL grid or connection requirements.
summary.zh: 老挝没有欧盟式横向电池法规，也没有覆盖所有电子电气设备的横向RoHS制度。对锂电池和移动电源而言，实务筛查重点是产品是否被作为受管制商品而需要DOSM合格评定认证，以及老挝是否采纳或引用相关IEC/ASEAN安全标准。用于储能或电动车场景时，还可能需要按项目层面对齐能源矿产部政策及老挝电力公司的电网或接入要求。
summary.zht: 寮國沒有歐盟式橫向電池法規，也沒有覆蓋所有電子電氣設備的橫向RoHS制度。對鋰電池和行動電源而言，實務篩查重點是產品是否被作為受管制商品而需要DOSM合格評定認證，以及寮國是否採納或引用相關IEC/ASEAN安全標準。用於儲能或電動車場景時，還可能需要按項目層面對齊能源礦產部政策及寮國電力公司的電網或接入要求。

standards_or_laws: DOSM conformity certification framework for regulated goods
IEC and ASEAN-adopted battery and electrical safety standards used by Laos where adopted
MEM energy and EV policy context for energy-storage or vehicle applications
No Laos horizontal RoHS regime identified for all EEE

summary.en: China's common equivalent evidence for portable lithium batteries is GB 31241 testing, with CCC where the product category is in scope. China also has RoHS-style substance controls for domestic EEE, but those China domestic controls do not create a one-to-one Laos requirement and do not replace a DOSM regulated-goods determination.
summary.zh: 中国便携式锂电池的常见等效证据为GB 31241测试，产品类别纳入范围时还包括CCC。中国也有面向国内电子电气产品的RoHS类物质控制，但这些中国国内要求不等同于老挝要求，也不能替代DOSM受管制商品范围判断。
summary.zht: 中國便攜式鋰電池的常見等效證據為GB 31241測試，產品類別納入範圍時還包括CCC。中國也有面向國內電子電氣產品的RoHS類物質控制，但這些中國國內要求不等同於寮國要求，也不能替代DOSM受管制商品範圍判斷。

standards_or_laws: China RoHS-style EEE substance controls for China domestic market where applicable

gap.en: Do not map EU Battery Regulation or EU RoHS obligations onto Laos as if they were horizontal Laos law. The Laos gap is mainly scope confirmation: check DOSM regulated-goods status, identify the IEC/ASEAN standard actually adopted or requested, and separate battery product compliance from MEM/EDL project approvals for energy systems.
gap.zh: 不要把欧盟电池法规或欧盟RoHS义务当作老挝横向法律直接套用。老挝差距主要在范围确认：核实DOSM受管制商品状态，识别实际采纳或要求的IEC/ASEAN标准，并将电池产品合规与能源系统的能源矿产部/老挝电力公司项目审批区分开。
gap.zht: 不要把歐盟電池法規或歐盟RoHS義務當作寮國橫向法律直接套用。寮國差距主要在範圍確認：核實DOSM受管制商品狀態，識別實際採納或要求的IEC/ASEAN標準，並將電池產品合規與能源系統的能源礦產部/寮國電力公司項目審批區分開。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory only where the product is inside Laos regulated-goods scope or project approvals apply; no horizontal Laos RoHS regime should be assumed.
mandatory_status.cn: GB 31241 baseline and CCC where applicable for China domestic scope.

source.publisher: Department of Standards and Metrology (DOSM), Lao PDR

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat Laos as a DOSM scope-confirmation market, not an EU-style battery/RoHS market. Confirm regulated-goods status and the adopted IEC/ASEAN standard before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将老挝视为需确认DOSM范围的市场，而不是欧盟式电池/RoHS市场。出货前请确认受管制商品状态及所采纳的IEC/ASEAN标准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將寮國視為需確認DOSM範圍的市場，而不是歐盟式電池/RoHS市場。出貨前請確認受管制商品狀態及所採納的IEC/ASEAN標準。
